assertions.description: No signal analysis detected (0 signals) - voltage regulators (AP7361C-33E 3.3V LDO, LM7805 5V, buck converter), I2C bus (MCP23017 + INA219), motor driver circuit (VN7007ALH), and buzzer circuit should all be detectable
+3.3V and +3V3 are likely the same rail but listed separately - could note this as a design observation
